---
title: "FFAR Project Text Mining"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: 
  html:
    theme: flatly
    fontsize: 0.8em
    code-fold: FALSE
    code-tools: TRUE
    code-copy: TRUE
    toc: TRUE
    toc-depth: 4
    smooth-scroll: TRUE
    embed-resources: TRUE
    fig-align: center
editor: visual
---

# Import data
```{r}
#| label: import
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
#| echo: TRUE  
```

# Clean data
